name: Add Tag Button
notes: onClick fires handleAddTag(); also triggered by Enter key in the tag input via handleTagKeyPress (line 659).
Adds the trimmed input to tagEditorTags only if: (a) non-empty after trim, (b) not already present in tagEditorTags, (c) tagEditorTags.length < 10.
No API call — modifies local modal state only; the tag is not persisted until the user clicks Save.
maxLength={50} on the input element provides a secondary guard on tag length, but handleAddTag itself does not enforce a character-count limit.
